company_description: 1031 Crowdfunding is an Irvine, California-based real estate investment platform founded in 2014 that specializes in 1031 exchange-eligible Delaware Statutory Trust (DST) investments. The platform helps investors defer capital gains taxes through tax-advantaged real estate investments, offering access to institutional-quality multifamily, industrial, and net-leased properties structured as DSTs.

Based in Irvine, CA. 1031 Crowdfunding (IR) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on 1031/dst opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.
37th Parallel Properties is a multifamily real estate investment firm with a 100% profitable track record across $1 billion+ in transaction volume.

52TEN is an Arizona-based investment firm specializing in stabilized mobile home parks in high-demand markets. Founded by Nate Pattee and Jack Martin, the company focuses on building portfolios that prioritize long-term value with reliable cash flow. 52TEN is known for consistent operations and a resident-friendly management approach.

Based in San Francisco, CA. 7e Investments is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Accountable Equity is a real estate syndication firm providing accredited investors with opportunities in hospitality, golf resorts, and operating hotel investments. The firm focuses on experiential real estate assets that generate both income and appreciation. They provide detailed sponsor information and past performance data through their investor portal.

AcreTrader is a farmland investing platform that offers fractional ownership in U.S. farmland through a syndication-like structure. The platform provides accredited investors with passive exposure to agricultural real estate, one of the most stable asset classes historically. AcreTrader handles all aspects of farm management and operation.

Based in Denver, CO. Aimco is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Alliant Capital is one of the largest multifamily investment companies in the United States focused on tax credit syndication for affordable rental housing. Since inception, Alliant has raised more than $8 billion in equity and completed over 1,000 tax credit investment deals. The firm was acquired by Walker & Dunlop in 2021.

American Campus Communities was the largest developer, owner, and manager of high-quality student housing properties in the United States before being acquired by Blackstone in 2022 for $12.8 billion. The company managed 170+ properties with over 111,000 beds near top universities. ACC pioneered the institutional student housing market.

American Communities Trust is a private real estate investment firm focused on acquiring and developing retail properties in underserved communities. The firm partners with national retailers and local businesses to revitalize commercial corridors and provide essential services. ACT targets areas where there is significant consumer demand but limited retail supply.

Based in New York, NY. American Realty Capital Properties is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on nnn/diversified opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Americold Realty Trust is the world's largest publicly traded REIT focused on temperature-controlled warehouses. The company owns and operates over 245 temperature-controlled facilities globally totaling approximately 1.5 billion cubic feet. Americold serves food producers, food distributors, and grocery retailers with cold storage and logistics solutions.

Based in New York, NY. Angelo Gordon is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on diversified re opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Based in Knoxville, TN. Apartment Investing is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Based in Scottsdale, AZ. Apartment Management Consultants is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily pm opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Apogee Capital is a multifamily real estate syndication firm based in Dallas, Texas, that helps passive investors build wealth through commercial apartment investments. The firm purchases medium-size B and C class properties with value-add opportunities, leveraging renovations and operational improvements for maximum returns.

Apollo Global Management's real estate division is a major institutional real estate investor with significant holdings across commercial and residential properties. The firm pursues value-oriented investment strategies in both equity and debt, targeting opportunistic and core-plus returns. Apollo manages billions in real estate across North America, Europe, and Asia.

Based in Santa Barbara, CA. AppFolio Investment Management is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on re software opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Apple Hospitality REIT is one of the largest publicly traded REITs in the hotel sector, owning a portfolio of upscale select-service hotels primarily branded under Marriott and Hilton. The company owns approximately 220 hotels with more than 29,000 guest rooms across 37 states. Apple Hospitality targets properties in markets with diverse demand generators.

Ares Management Real Estate is the real estate investment arm of Ares Management Corporation, managing over $47 billion in real estate equity and debt strategies. The firm focuses on value-add and opportunistic investments across multifamily, industrial, office, and retail properties. Ares provides institutional and individual investor access to commercial real estate.

Based in Los Angeles, CA. Ares Real Estate is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on diversified re opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Arrived Homes (backed by Jeff Bezos) is a real estate investment platform that allows investors to purchase shares of rental homes starting at just $100. The platform handles property selection, acquisition, management, and eventual disposition. Arrived has facilitated investments in hundreds of single-family rental properties across growing U.S. markets.
Ashcroft Capital is a vertically integrated investment firm specializing in acquiring and managing apartment communities across the Sun Belt.

Based in New York, NY. Ashcroft Capital (IR) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Based in New York, NY. Ashcroft Capital (New Investors) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Ashland Capital Partners focuses on multifamily in the Southeast, targeting value-add properties in Nashville and growing Tennessee markets. The firm specializes in Class B and C workforce housing with renovation upside, implementing strategic improvements to increase property values. Their deep knowledge of Tennessee markets enables effective execution.

Aspen Funds is a diversified real estate investment firm based in Houston, Texas, with over $250 million deployed across multiple asset classes including multifamily syndications and mortgage note investments. Founded with a mission to provide investors with consistent passive income, Aspen Funds has developed expertise in both equity real estate investments and debt instruments. The firm offers accredited investors access to various real estate investment strategies through their managed funds.

Invests in mobile home parks, shopping centers, self-storage, and multi-family apartments. Hyper-focused operator, exclusively acquiring assets in Phoenix, AZ. Robust online presence with significant transparency and reputation. Boots-on-the-ground operations in Phoenix, AZ. Enhanced economics and streamlined process for Fund of Funds managers.

Atlas Capital Group is a full-service real estate investment, development, and management firm founded in 2006 by Jeffrey Goldberger and Andrew Cohen. Headquartered in Los Angeles with offices in New York, the firm invests in opportunistic and value-added transactions in core gateway cities, specializing in mixed-use, multifamily, and commercial properties.

Atlas Real Estate Partners is a vertically-integrated firm focused on multifamily in Colorado and the Mountain West region with over $180 million deployed. Based in Denver, the firm combines investment expertise with property management capabilities to deliver consistent returns. Their deep knowledge of Colorado markets allows them to identify attractive opportunities and execute value-add business plans effectively.

AVAF Holdings specializes in multifamily and commercial properties in Texas with over $200 million deployed. The firm focuses on value-add opportunities in Houston, Dallas-Fort Worth, San Antonio, and Austin with hands-on property management. Their experienced team identifies underperforming assets and implements strategic improvements to maximize investor returns while maintaining strong relationships with residents and communities.

AvalonBay Communities (NYSE: AVB) is one of the largest apartment REITs in the United States, founded in 1978 and headquartered in Arlington, Virginia. The company develops, acquires, and manages high-quality apartment communities in supply-constrained coastal markets, owning approximately 90,000 apartment homes across the Northeast, Mid-Atlantic, Pacific Northwest, and Northern and Southern California.

Based in Irvine, CA. Avanath Capital (IR) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on affordable mf opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Based in Irvine, CA. Avanath Capital Management is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on affordable mf opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Back Bay Investment Group, Southern California's premier real estate investment and development firm, creates value in multifamily and residential assets utilizing our proven 4 step system consisting of identifying, acquiring, improving, and monetizing. Our focus is on creating high-quality investments through real estate syndication as a way for investors to pool together their financial and intellectual resources to invest in multifamily and residential real estate properties that are much bigger than they could afford or manage on their own.

Bakerson is a multifamily investment firm based in Atlanta, Georgia, with over $300 million deployed across apartment communities throughout the Southeast. The company specializes in acquiring and operating value-add Class B and C multifamily properties in growth markets including Georgia, Florida, South Carolina, and Tennessee. Founded with a focus on workforce housing, Bakerson targets properties in markets with strong employment growth, population migration, and favorable landlord-tenant regulations.

BAM Capital is a Midwest-focused multifamily investment firm based in Indianapolis, Indiana, with a portfolio exceeding $900 million in assets under management. The company has distinguished itself as one of the premier apartment syndicators in the region, specializing in acquiring and operating Class A and Class B apartment communities throughout the Midwest. Founded with a mission to provide investors with access to institutional-quality real estate investments, BAM Capital focuses on stable, cash-flowing properties with strong fundamentals in markets characterized by diverse employment bases, population growth, and landlord-friendly regulations.

Founded in 1995, Bayshore Capital is a Toronto-based private real estate investment fund focused on distressed multifamily properties and value creation. The firm finances and builds companies that create value in real estate, financial services, and information technology, with a remarkable record of identifying opportunities and assembling management teams.
One of the nation's largest apartment managers, ranked on NMHC Top 50 Managers List 2025. Specializes in apartment management, investment, and development across the country.

Blackstone is the world's largest alternative asset manager, with more than $1 trillion in AUM. We serve institutional and individual investors. Blackstone is a global leader in real estate investing.

Blue Elm Investments is a real estate syndication firm focusing on adding value to distressed mobile home parks across the country. Founded by Todd Sulzinger, who spent over 25 years as a finance executive for Silicon Valley technology companies, the firm brings institutional financial discipline to manufactured housing investments.

Based in Los Angeles, CA. Blue Lake Capital is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Based in New York, NY. Bluerock Residential Growth REIT is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Bluerock Value Exchange (BVEX), a subsidiary of Bluerock Real Estate, is a national sponsor of syndicated 1031 exchange offerings for over 18 years. The firm focuses on Premier Exchange Properties that seek to deliver stable cash flows and potential for value creation. BVEX offers capacity across nearly all real estate sectors with the ability to customize transactions.

Boston Financial Investment Management is one of the largest real estate syndicators in the United States, with a portfolio size of 163,706 units as of 2024. The company specializes in tax credit syndication and asset management for affordable housing.

Based in Dallas, TX. Brad Sumrok / Sumrok Capital is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily/education opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Bridge Industrial is a privately-owned, vertically integrated real estate operating company and investment manager focused on the acquisition and development of Class A industrial real estate. The firm targets supply-constrained core industrial markets including Chicago, Miami, New Jersey, and New York. Bridge Industrial has developed millions of square feet of logistics and distribution facilities.

Based in Salt Lake City, UT. Bridge Investment Group is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily/diversified opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Broadmark Realty Capital is a private real estate lending firm that provides short-term bridge loans secured by first deeds of trust on commercial and residential properties. Founded in 2010 and headquartered in Seattle, the firm has originated over $2 billion in loans and focuses on construction, renovation, and value-add projects across the Western and Mountain states.

Bronson Equity focuses on multifamily syndications with a disciplined value-add approach across the Midwest region. The firm targets Class B and C workforce housing in Illinois, Indiana, and Ohio, implementing comprehensive renovation programs to increase property values. Their conservative underwriting approach emphasizes capital preservation.

Brookfield Asset Management is one of the world's largest alternative asset managers with over $900 billion in assets under management. Their real estate division invests in office, retail, multifamily, logistics, hospitality, and alternative real estate globally. Brookfield Real Estate offers both public and private investment vehicles.

Based in Newport Beach, CA. Buchannan Street Partners is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on diversified re opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Buchanan Street Partners, founded in 1999, is a real estate investment management firm headquartered in Newport Beach, California. The firm, a SEC registered investment advisor since 2002, manages commingled investment funds, institutional separate accounts and high net worth investment vehicles. Since its inception, Buchanan Street Partners has invested in over $8 billion of real estate debt and equity investments.

Cadre is a New York-based real estate technology platform founded in 2014 by Ryan Williams that provides direct access to institutional-quality commercial real estate investments. The platform has facilitated over $5 billion in transactions, offering a secondary market for liquidity and AI-powered analytics for deal selection across multifamily, industrial, and office sectors.

Based in New York, NY. Cadre (IR) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on re tech opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Caliber (NASDAQ: CWD) is a vertically integrated alternative asset management firm headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona, focused on middle-market real estate and private equity investments in the American Southwest. The firm manages over $800 million in assets across multifamily, hospitality, and commercial developments, offering accredited and non-accredited investors access through its Caliber Funds.

Based in Scottsdale, AZ. Caliber (IR) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on diversified re opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Camden Property Trust (NYSE: CPT) is a publicly traded REIT founded in 1982 and headquartered in Houston, Texas, that owns, manages, and develops multifamily apartment communities. The company operates approximately 58,000 apartment homes across 15 major U.S. markets, consistently ranked among the best places to work and recognized for its innovative property management approach.

Cantor Fitzgerald Investment Management offers DST and real estate fund opportunities through its extensive institutional platform. With expertise in DSTs, opportunity zones, and real estate funds, CFI has raised over $2 billion in equity and manages an expanding portfolio of multifamily, industrial, office, retail, and life sciences assets.

Based in Los Angeles, CA. Canyon Capital Advisors is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on diversified re opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Based in Glen Allen, VA. Capital Square is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on 1031/dst opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Capital Square 1031 is a national real estate investment firm based in Richmond, Virginia, specializing in Delaware Statutory Trust (DST) investments for 1031 exchange investors and direct real estate syndications. With over $600 million in assets under management, the company offers accredited investors access to institutional-quality real estate through tax-advantaged investment structures. Capital Square is a registered broker-dealer and member of FINRA, providing investors with a regulated platform.

Based in Glen Allen, VA. Capital Square (IR) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on 1031/dst opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Capstone Development is a minority-owned real estate investment firm specializing in multifamily and hospitality assets. Founded by former Marriott executive Norman Jenkins in 2009, the company raises equity for multifamily developments primarily on the East Coast. Capstone brings institutional-quality development to diverse communities.

Cardone Capital's portfolio currently consists of 13,500+ units with a total value of $4.5 billion. Specializing in multifamily units, Cardone Capital raises money from the public by launching equity funds in which everyone can invest.

Casmon Capital Group is a multifamily real estate syndication firm that helps passive investors build wealth through apartment investing. The firm hosts the Apartment Investing Journey podcast and focuses on value-add multifamily properties in growing markets. They emphasize investor education and transparent communication.

The Cauble Group is a commercial real estate investment and education firm led by Tyler Cauble. The firm specializes in commercial real estate syndications and provides extensive educational content on investing in commercial properties. Tyler is a well-known CRE content creator and author focused on helping investors understand syndication mechanics.

CBRE Investment Management is a leading global real estate investment management firm and a wholly owned subsidiary of CBRE Group. The firm manages approximately $147 billion in assets across real estate, infrastructure, and private credit. They offer a broad range of investment strategies including core, value-add, and opportunistic real estate.

Cedar Creek Capital, founded by AJ Osborne, specializes in acquiring and repositioning self-storage facilities throughout the United States. AJ is a leading voice in self-storage investing and author of The Investor's Guide to Growing Wealth in Self-Storage. The company focuses on cash-flowing properties with value-add potential using operational improvements and market repositioning.

Based in New York, NY. Cerberus Real Estate Capital is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on diversified re opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Chatham Lodging Trust is a publicly traded REIT focused on upscale extended-stay and premium select-service hotels. The company owns approximately 39 hotels with over 5,900 rooms located in high-barrier-to-entry markets. Chatham targets hotels with strong demand from corporate and government travelers.

Clarion Partners is one of the largest real estate investment managers in the United States, founded in 1982 and headquartered in New York City. A subsidiary of Franklin Templeton, the firm manages over $80 billion in total assets across core, core-plus, and value-add strategies, investing in industrial, multifamily, office, and retail properties for institutional clients globally.

Based in Phoenix, AZ. Cole Credit Property Trust is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on nnn/diversified opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Based in Menomonee Falls, WI. Continental Properties is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Core Multifamily Investments focuses on apartments in Southern California and Arizona with a value-add approach. The firm targets Class B and C workforce housing with renovation upside in San Diego and Phoenix markets. Their experienced team implements strategic improvements to maximize property values and returns for investors.

CRE Diversified Income Fund offers investors exposure to a diversified portfolio of commercial real estate investments. The fund focuses on income-producing properties across multiple asset classes to provide stable monthly distributions. They accept both accredited and non-accredited investors depending on the offering.

Based in New York, NY. Crossroads Capital is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on opportunistic investing opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

CrowdStreet is a Portland, Oregon-based real estate investment marketplace founded in 2014 that provides accredited investors direct access to individual commercial real estate projects and funds. The platform has facilitated billions in investments across multifamily, industrial, office, and hospitality projects, though it pivoted its business model in 2023 after a sponsor fraud incident.
Crow Holdings is a leading real estate investment and development firm whose founding principles are partnership, collaboration, and alignment of interests.

Based in Dallas, TX. Crow Holdings (IR) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on diversified re opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Crystal View Capital operates at the intersection of scale and specialization, managing a growing portfolio of mobile home parks and self-storage properties. Founded by Matthew Ricciardella, the firm has over $500 million in assets under management. Crystal View uses a vertically integrated model handling acquisitions, operations, and investor relations in-house.

CubeSmart is a publicly traded self-storage REIT and one of the top five self-storage operators in the United States. The company owns or manages over 1,400 self-storage facilities across the country. CubeSmart focuses on dense, high-population markets and offers third-party management services to self-storage operators.

Delta Communities is a mobile home park syndication fund that acquires and manages manufactured housing communities. The firm utilizes InvestNext to manage the entire lifecycle of every community syndication, from raising capital to complex waterfall distributions. They focus on providing predictable cash flow through lower-risk mobile home park investments.

Dermot Company is a vertically integrated real estate firm specializing in the development, investment, and management of luxury residential properties. Based in New York City, the firm has developed and managed thousands of high-end apartment units across major metropolitan markets. Dermot is known for creating premium living experiences in prime urban locations.

Disrupt Equity is a technology-forward multifamily investment firm based in Houston, Texas, with over $350 million deployed across apartment communities throughout the Lone Star State. Founded by Feras Moussa, the company has distinguished itself through its innovative use of data analytics and technology to identify undervalued multifamily properties. The firm specializes in acquiring Class B and C workforce housing apartments in Houston, Dallas-Fort Worth, San Antonio, and Austin. Their investment strategy focuses on properties with significant value-add potential where they can implement comprehensive renovation programs and operational improvements.

Based in Houston, TX. Disrupt Equity (Capital Markets) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

DiversyFund is a San Diego-based real estate crowdfunding platform founded in 2016 that allows non-accredited investors to invest in multifamily real estate with no management fees. The platform's Growth REIT focuses on acquiring and repositioning value-add apartment communities, offering everyday investors access to institutional-style real estate with minimum investments of $500.

DLP Capital is a private real estate investment and financial services company focused on making an IMPACT by acquiring, developing, and building relationships, housing, communities, and opportunities.
Invests in self-storage assets as an early-stage syndicator building a portfolio of storage facilities. Uses InvestNext platform for investor management and capital raising.

Easterly Government Properties is a publicly traded REIT focused exclusively on the acquisition, development, and management of Class A commercial properties leased to U.S. Government agencies. The company's portfolio includes properties leased to agencies like the FBI, DEA, FDA, and VA. Easterly provides exposure to one of the most creditworthy tenants in the world.

Based in Memphis, TN. EdR (Education Realty Trust) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on student housing opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Elevate Commercial focuses on multifamily in Texas with over $150 million deployed, specializing in Class B and C workforce housing with value-add potential. The firm targets properties in growing Texas submarkets where they can implement renovation programs and operational improvements to increase property values and returns for their investor partners.

Based in Columbia, MD. Enterprise Housing Credit is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on lihtc opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Enterprise Housing Credit Investments is a division of Enterprise Community Partners, one of the nation's leading affordable housing organizations. They syndicate Low-Income Housing Tax Credits to help finance the development and preservation of affordable rental housing. With over 115,000 units syndicated, they are a top-5 syndicator nationally.

Equity Commonwealth is a publicly traded REIT focused on the acquisition and management of office properties. Led by Sam Zell's former team, the company has pursued an active portfolio repositioning strategy, selling lower-quality assets and maintaining a significant cash position for opportunistic acquisitions. The firm is known for its disciplined capital allocation approach.

Equity LifeStyle Properties (ELS) is a publicly traded REIT that owns and operates manufactured home communities, RV resorts, campgrounds, and marinas. Founded by Sam Zell, ELS manages over 440 properties containing over 170,000 sites across 35 states and British Columbia. The company targets lifestyle-oriented communities in desirable locations.

Based in New York, NY. Equity Multiple is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on crowdfunding/re opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

EquityMultiple is a New York-based real estate investment platform founded in 2015 that provides accredited investors access to institutional-quality commercial real estate through equity, preferred equity, and debt investments. The platform specializes in curated deal flow across multifamily, industrial, and office sectors with investment minimums typically starting at $5,000.

Based in Chicago, IL. Equity Residential is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Equity Trust Company is one of the largest self-directed IRA custodians in the United States, enabling investors to invest retirement funds in real estate syndications, private equity, and alternative assets. Founded in 1974, the firm holds over $40 billion in assets under custody. They partner with real estate syndicators to facilitate IRA-based investments.

Essex Property Trust (NYSE: ESS) is a publicly traded REIT founded in 1971 and headquartered in San Mateo, California, focused exclusively on multifamily apartments on the West Coast. The company owns approximately 62,000 apartment homes across Southern California, Northern California, and the Seattle metro area, targeting supply-constrained, high-barrier-to-entry markets with strong job growth.

Evergreen Residential focuses on sustainable multifamily developments that combine environmental responsibility with strong financial performance. Our properties feature energy-efficient designs and smart home technology.

Excelsior Capital is a boutique investment firm based in Nashville specializing in net lease and multifamily investments across the Southeast with over $300 million deployed. The firm focuses on stable income-producing assets with long-term tenants and strong credit quality in Tennessee, Georgia, Alabama, Kentucky, and Florida. Their conservative investment approach emphasizes capital preservation and consistent cash flow for their investor partners.

ExchangeRight Real Estate is a national real estate investment company specializing in net-leased properties for 1031 exchanges and direct investments. The firm acquires necessity-based retail, medical, and industrial properties leased to investment-grade tenants. ExchangeRight has acquired over $6 billion in real estate assets.

Based in San Diego, CA. Fairfield Residential is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Fairway America is a private real estate investment manager founded in 1992 and headquartered in Portland, Oregon. With over 30 years of experience, the firm structures and executes diversified credit and equity portfolios in middle-market real estate, partnering with local operators to deliver alternative asset-based investment products to sophisticated investors.

Based in New York, NY. ForwardLane is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on ai/re opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Based in Dallas, TX. Four Street Capital is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on dst opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Fundrise is a Washington, DC-based real estate crowdfunding platform founded in 2012 that pioneered online real estate investing for everyday investors. With over $7 billion in assets under management and more than 400,000 active investors, the platform offers diversified eREITs and eFunds investing in multifamily, industrial, and single-family rental properties, with minimum investments starting at $10.

Tech-forward real estate syndication company specializing in value-add projects and new-build construction in the Los Angeles market. Over $65 million invested by 8,500+ investors with proprietary software streamlining the syndication process.

Global Medical REIT is a net-lease medical office REIT focused on acquiring purpose-built healthcare facilities. The company targets properties that are essential to healthcare delivery in their communities, leased to physician groups and healthcare systems. GMED manages a portfolio of approximately 190 properties across 35 states.

Based in Lafayette Hill, PA. GoldOller Real Estate Investments is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Goodegg Investments is a women-led real estate investment firm founded by Annie Dickerson and Julie Lam, with over $250 million deployed through strategic joint venture partnerships with experienced multifamily operators. Based in the San Francisco Bay Area, the company helps busy professionals invest passively in apartment syndications across high-growth Sun Belt markets. The firm's unique approach involves partnering with vetted operators who have proven track records in multifamily investing, allowing investors to access institutional-quality investments while benefiting from their thorough vetting process.

GowerCrowd is a real estate syndication education and marketing platform helping sponsors raise capital for their investment offerings. Founded by Adam Gower, the firm provides digital marketing services for real estate syndicators and educational content for investors. They also publish research on real estate crowdfunding and syndication platforms.

Graceada Partners is a multifamily investment firm based in Modesto, California, specializing in apartment communities in California's Central Valley and other growing secondary markets. With over $200 million in assets under management, the company has established expertise in markets often overlooked by larger institutional investors. The region offers attractive yields compared to coastal California markets while benefiting from spillover growth from the Bay Area.

Specializes in distressed and undervalued multifamily properties with a focus on the Midwest and Southeast. CEO Gideon Pfeffer leads with a hands-on approach targeting properties requiring substantial renovation or repositioning.

Based in Norfolk, VA. Harbor Group International is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Harrison Street is a leading investment management firm exclusively focused on alternative real estate assets including education, healthcare, storage, and life sciences. With approximately $56 billion in assets under management, the firm targets sectors with strong demographic tailwinds. Harrison Street is one of the largest investors in student housing, senior housing, and self-storage in North America.

Haven Capital focuses on multifamily acquisitions in Texas growth markets, targeting value-add opportunities with strong demographics in Austin and San Antonio. The firm specializes in Class B and C workforce housing with renovation upside, implementing comprehensive improvement programs. Their Central Texas expertise enables effective deal sourcing.

Healthcare Trust is a non-traded REIT focused on acquiring healthcare-related real estate, including medical office buildings, senior housing, and healthcare facilities. The firm provides investors with exposure to the growing healthcare real estate sector through a diversified portfolio of medical properties. Healthcare Trust targets properties with long-term leases to creditworthy healthcare tenants.

Healthpeak Properties is a publicly traded REIT that invests in life science, medical office, and continuing care retirement community real estate. With a portfolio valued at approximately $20 billion, Healthpeak is one of the largest healthcare-focused REITs. The company merged with Physicians Realty Trust in 2024 to expand its medical office portfolio.

High Return Real Estate focuses on multifamily investments in Utah and the Mountain West, led by experienced operator Jack Petrick. The firm targets Class B and C workforce housing with value-add potential in Utah, Idaho, and Nevada. Their conservative underwriting approach emphasizes capital preservation while seeking attractive returns.

Highwoods Properties is a publicly traded REIT that owns, develops, acquires, leases, and manages properties primarily in the best business districts of Atlanta, Charlotte, Dallas, Nashville, Orlando, Raleigh, Richmond, and Tampa. The company's portfolio consists of approximately 27 million square feet of office and mixed-use space.

Hines is a privately owned global real estate investment, development, and property management firm founded in 1957. The firm has developed, redeveloped, or acquired over 1,700 properties totaling over 530 million square feet. Hines manages $93.2 billion in assets across residential, commercial, and mixed-use properties in 30 countries.

Horizon Capital is an opportunistic real estate investment firm focused on finding and unlocking value in multifamily apartment communities and mobile home parks throughout the Southeast and Texas. The firm uses local market knowledge, relationships, and a data-driven approach to identify undervalued assets with strong upside potential.

Horizon Investment Group focuses on identifying and capitalizing on emerging market opportunities in the industrial and logistics sector. Our data-driven approach and deep market relationships have enabled us to build a portfolio of high-performing assets.
Hudson Housing Capital is a real estate syndicator with a portfolio size of 76,887 units as of 2024. The company specializes in tax credit equity investments for affordable housing developments.
Hunt Capital Partners is a leading affordable housing provider that has raised over $3.8 billion in tax credit equity to create housing for low-income families, seniors, and special needs households.

Independence Realty Trust (NYSE: IRT) is a publicly traded REIT focused on owning and operating high-quality multifamily apartment properties in non-gateway U.S. markets with strong employment growth and favorable demographics. Headquartered in Philadelphia, the REIT owns approximately 35,000 units across the Sunbelt and Midwest, pursuing value-add renovations to drive rent growth.

Inland Private Capital Corporation (IPC) is the industry leader in Section 1031 exchange replacement properties and multiple-owner real estate investment solutions. With over 50 years of experience, they have delivered billions in assets across retail, multifamily, industrial, and student housing. IPC is one of the most established DST sponsors across multiple real estate cycles.

Based in Oak Brook, IL. Inland Real Estate Group is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on diversified re opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Based in Detroit, MI. InvestNext is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on re software opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Jackson Dearborn Partners is a Chicago-based real estate investment and development company focused on multifamily and student housing, with a special focus on Opportunity Zone investments. Their developments include mid-rise multifamily projects in high-growth markets. The company targets preferred returns of approximately 8% with 19% IRR over 10-year hold periods.

Jake and Gino is a multifamily education and investment company founded by Jake Stenziano and Gino Barbaro, with over $200 million in assets under management across apartment communities in Tennessee and surrounding states. The company is known for their Buy Right, Manage Right, Finance Right framework, which has helped thousands of investors learn the fundamentals of multifamily investing. Through their Wheelbarrow Profits brand, they offer courses, coaching programs, podcasts, and live events that teach investors how to analyze, acquire, and manage multifamily properties.
JLL Income Property Trust is a daily NAV REIT that gives investors access to a growing portfolio of commercial real estate investments selected by an institutional investment management team.

JMG Realty is a multifamily real estate investment and management firm based in Boca Raton, Florida. The firm specializes in acquiring, developing, and managing apartment communities in the Southeast. JMG has been operating for over 40 years with a portfolio spanning multiple states and thousands of units.

Kayne Anderson Real Estate is the real estate arm of Kayne Anderson Capital Advisors, a leading alternative investment firm based in Los Angeles with over $35 billion in AUM. The real estate group manages approximately $7 billion in medical office, senior living, student housing, and multifamily assets, focusing on needs-based property types with demographic-driven demand.

Kay Properties and Investments is a leading Delaware Statutory Trust (DST) investment firm and 1031 exchange marketplace. The firm provides access to DST opportunities from a variety of sponsor companies, offering investment-grade properties for tax-deferred exchanges. Kay Properties has facilitated billions in 1031 exchange investments nationwide.

One of the largest commercial real estate investors in the nation. Manages over $15 billion in diversified CRE including office, industrial, retail, and multifamily properties through various fund structures.

Keel Team actively syndicates mobile home park investments with a focus on buying value-add, mom-and-pop owned trailer parks and transforming them into well-managed communities. The firm provides comprehensive educational resources on mobile home park investing and syndication. They manage a growing portfolio of manufactured housing communities nationwide.

Based in Minneapolis, MN. Kingdom Capital is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

KKR Real Estate is the real estate investment arm of KKR & Co., one of the world's leading investment firms. LaSalle Investment Management is one of the world's leading real estate investment managers with approximately $90 billion in assets under management. Left Field Investors is an investor community and real estate investment firm founded by Jim Pfeifer, with over $50 million deployed through carefully curated syndication opportunities. RealCrowd is a Palo Alto, California-based online marketplace founded in 2013 that connects accredited investors directly with commercial real estate sponsors and operators. Sutera is an emerging Multifamily Investment & Property Management firm based in Nashville, Tennessee focused on Value-Add Acquisitions and Management, primarily in the Southeast. Every aspect of our business is designed to create value and enrich the lives of our partners, team members and residents. Our approach is characterized by strategic analytics, streamlined processes, transparent communication/reporting, and proactive cost-saving strategies while maintaining high service quality and experience-based living for our residents.
Tester

Sylvis Capital specializes in investing in large commercial real estate across emerging markets in the United States. We offer busy professionals the opportunity to invest alongside us, leveraging our extensive research and experience to reap the benefits of real estate without the day-to-day hassles of operations.

Syndicated Equities is a Chicago-based real estate investment firm with over 25 years of experience and more than $400 million in assets under management across the Midwest. The company specializes in multifamily and commercial real estate investments throughout Illinois, Wisconsin, Indiana, and Michigan. Their investment strategy emphasizes stable, income-producing properties in established markets with strong fundamentals and diverse employment bases.

SyndicationPro, now rebranded as SponsorCloud, is a technology platform providing investment management software for real estate syndicators and fund managers. The platform handles investor relations, document management, distributions, and compliance for syndication sponsors. They serve thousands of real estate investment firms nationwide.

Terreno Realty is a publicly traded REIT that acquires, owns, and operates industrial real estate in six major coastal U.S. markets. The company targets functional industrial properties in supply-constrained locations including New York, Northern New Jersey, Los Angeles, San Francisco, Seattle, and Miami. Terreno manages approximately 280 buildings totaling over 17 million square feet.

BAM Capital is the private equity arm of The BAM Companies, an institutional real estate owner/operator. BAM Capital offers its family of investors access to premier real estate investment opportunities, transparent stewardship of capital, a means to achieve portfolio diversification, and tax-advantaged, long-term wealth creation.

The Kitti Sisters, founded by Nancy and Palmy Kitti, is a multifamily investment firm with over $100 million deployed across apartment communities in Sun Belt markets. Based in San Diego, California, the sisters help busy professionals invest passively in apartment syndications. What distinguishes The Kitti Sisters is their focus on helping busy professionals, particularly those in demanding careers like healthcare, understand and access multifamily investments through extensive educational content.

The Real Estate Guys, led by Robert Helms and Russell Gray, is a real estate syndication education and investment platform with a massive podcast following. Through their investor registry and deal desks, members get access to a variety of investment offerings including syndications, precious metals, and lending funds. They host real estate syndication seminars and events nationwide.

Based in Greenwich, CT. The Richman Group is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on lihtc opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Based in Austin, TX. Top Producer Investment Capital is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Toro Real Estate Partners focuses on multifamily investments in Texas with a value-add strategy targeting Class B and C properties in growing Houston submarkets. The firm implements comprehensive renovation programs and operational improvements to increase property values and returns. Their Houston market expertise enables effective deal sourcing.

TPG Real Estate is the real estate investment platform of TPG, a leading global alternative asset management firm. The division focuses on large-scale real estate investments across hospitality, residential, and commercial sectors. TPG Real Estate manages approximately $17 billion in assets and has executed notable transactions in gaming, resorts, and multifamily.

Transcend Equity focuses on multifamily investments in Florida, targeting value-add properties in growing Tampa Bay markets. The firm specializes in Class B and C workforce housing with renovation upside, implementing strategic improvements to maximize property values. Their Florida market expertise enables effective execution of business plans.

Specializes in distressed and value-add multifamily assets on the West Coast and Southeast. Led by Max Sharkansky, targets properties with operational inefficiencies and untapped value potential. Strong track record of repositioning outdated buildings into high-demand rental communities.

TriPost Capital Partners is a real estate investment platform with in-house underwriting, servicing, and asset management capabilities. The firm supports acquisitions, repositions, and recapitalizations, providing integrated solutions for sponsors and investors. They focus on middle-market commercial real estate transactions.

TriStar Multifamily focuses on apartments in Tennessee and the Southeast with a value-add strategy. The firm targets Class B and C workforce housing with renovation upside in Nashville, Memphis, and Knoxville markets. Their deep Tennessee market knowledge enables them to identify attractive opportunities and execute business plans effectively.

Based in Highlands Ranch, CO. UDR (United Dominion Realty Trust) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

UMH Properties is a publicly traded REIT that owns and operates manufactured home communities in the eastern United States. The company manages approximately 135 communities containing about 25,600 developed homesites. UMH also maintains an inventory of manufactured homes for sale or rental and focuses on providing affordable housing options.

Valiance Capital is a real estate syndication firm providing accredited investors access to institutional-grade commercial real estate investments. The firm focuses on multifamily and commercial properties in high-growth markets, emphasizing transparent operations and conservative underwriting. They provide detailed investor guides and educational resources.

Vantage Apartments Group focuses on multifamily in Las Vegas and Southern Nevada markets with value-add strategies. The firm targets Class B and C workforce housing with renovation upside, implementing comprehensive improvement programs to increase property values. Their Nevada market expertise enables them to navigate this dynamic market.

VanWest Partners is a Denver-based real estate investment company specializing in the acquisition, development, and management of self storage facilities. We are leaders in both commercial real estate and our local communities, thereby providing superior returns to our investors.

Veritas Investments is one of the largest owners of apartment buildings in San Francisco, managing a portfolio of over 250 properties. The firm specializes in acquiring and repositioning small to mid-size multifamily buildings in supply-constrained urban markets. Veritas is known for its deep expertise in rent-controlled and value-add apartment strategies.

Verivest specializes in multifamily and commercial real estate investments in the Southwest and Texas with over $180 million deployed. The firm focuses on value-add opportunities in growing markets, leveraging their experienced team to identify undervalued properties and implement strategic improvements. Their investor-focused approach emphasizes transparency and consistent communication.

Vertical Street Ventures focuses on multifamily syndications in California and the Southwest, targeting value-add properties with strong fundamentals. The firm specializes in Class B and C workforce housing with renovation upside in California, Arizona, and Texas markets. Their experienced team implements strategic improvements to maximize returns.

Victor Menasce / Y Street Capital is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily/dev opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Private equity real estate firm specializing in multifamily syndications, founded in 2015 by physicians Vikram Raya and Ravi Gupta. Focuses on Class B and C properties in appreciating markets with strong emphasis on investor education and community-building.

Based in Danville, CA. Vinney Chopra / Moneil is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Based in Danville, CA. Vinney Chopra / Moneil Investment Group is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.
Private investment firm focused on real estate development and syndication across multiple asset classes. Targets technology-driven real estate opportunities and mixed-use developments.

Vista Capital Partners is a commercial real estate finance firm with over $5 billion in completed financial transactions and 40 years of experience. A proud member of the Commercial Finance Broker Network (CFBN), VCP specializes in debt and equity financing for real estate developers and investors nationwide.

Walker & Dunlop is a real estate syndicator with a portfolio size of 70,005 units as of 2024. The company provides a comprehensive range of capital solutions for all commercial real estate asset classes.

Based in Chicago, IL. Waterton Associates is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Weinstein Properties is a vertically integrated multifamily real estate company based in Richmond, Virginia. The firm owns and manages over 12,000 apartment units across the Mid-Atlantic and Southeast regions. Weinstein focuses on workforce and affordable housing with a long-term ownership approach and in-house property management.

Based in Lynchburg, VA. Wellings Capital (IR) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on storage/mhp opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.

Wildhorn Capital is a multifamily investment firm based in Austin, Texas, with over $200 million deployed across apartment communities in Central Texas. The company specializes in value-add multifamily investments in Austin and surrounding markets, capitalizing on the region's exceptional population and job growth. Founded with a focus on the Austin market, Wildhorn Capital has developed deep expertise in Central Texas real estate, enabling them to identify attractive acquisition opportunities.

Based in Austin, TX. Wildhorn Capital (IR) is a real estate investment and syndication firm focused on multifamily opportunities. The firm works with accredited investors to acquire, manage, and grow institutional-quality real estate assets.
WNC is a national investor in real estate and community development initiatives, specializing in affordable housing.

Woodfield Development Company, based in Charleston, SC, is a developer and operator of Class A multifamily communities throughout the Southeast and Mid-Atlantic regions. The firm handles all aspects of development from site selection through lease-up and stabilization. Woodfield has developed thousands of luxury apartment units in high-growth markets.

Yieldstreet is a New York-based alternative investment platform founded in 2015 that provides investors access to asset-backed opportunities across real estate, private credit, art, legal finance, and venture capital. With over $4 billion invested on the platform, Yieldstreet offers both accredited and non-accredited investors diversified exposure through individual deals and its Prism Fund.

Founded in 1991 by Stephen Ziff and Tim Walter, Ziff Real Estate Partners is led by a core team of principals with more than 150 years of real estate investment management and operating experience. Headquartered in Charleston, SC we invest in neighborhood retail, self-storage, office, and small bay warehouse properties and manage all aspects of the investment process with an in-house team of property managers, maintenance and construction professionals and leasing agents.
